title: Apple AI Chief John Giannandrea To Exit This Week Amid Apple Intelligence Struggles
description: John Giannandrea, Apple’s artificial intelligence leader since 2018, is leaving the company soon, possibly by April 15. His departure follows a diminished role after Apple’s AI initiatives, including Siri upgrades, failed to meet expectations., Technology & Science, Times Now
content:

title: VGTel, Inc. (OTCID:VGTL) Announces Provisional Patent Filing and Public Release of MiraLink™ Signal Intelligence Framework
description: LANDER, Wyo., April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- VGTel, Inc. (OTCID: VGTL), an astronomy-driven technology company advancing next-generation sensing systems, artificial intelligence, aerospace, and UAP (Unidentified Aerial Phenomena) research initiatives, today announced the filing of a provisional patent application and the public release of a technical whitepaper for its MiraLink™ system.
